module.name: no-magic-strings
module.description: Disallow magic strings in comparisons and switch cases; use named constants instead.

scenarios.name: should allow a comparison against a named constant
scenarios.given: a comparison status === STATUS_ACTIVE where STATUS_ACTIVE is a const

scenarios.name: should allow a string literal in a variable initializer
should report a raw string literal used in a comparison
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the binary expression
scenarios.then: a noMagicStrings violation is reported on the string literal

scenarios.name: should report a raw string literal used as a switch case value
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the SwitchCase test
